summary: The review of the Data Transfer Agreement reveals a moderate to high-risk posture due to critical deficiencies in confidentiality and intellectual property clauses. The confidentiality provisions lack essential exclusions, duration specifications, and alignment with UoA Position #POS-11, while multiple intellectual property clauses require referral to Auckland UniServices Ltd for compliance with UoA Position #POS-IP. Immediate escalation to the Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts, and Auckland UniServices Ltd is recommended to address these flagged issues and ensure the agreement aligns with institutional policies.
